title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pune University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
